templates.original: The superhero's greatest asset in battle is their unparalleled Intelligence, which allows them to outsmart any adversary.
templates.template_pattern: The superhero's greatest asset in battle is their unparalleled [ATTRIBUTE_NAME], which allows them to outsmart any adversary.
